dct:title: Demographic, psychosocial and clinical factors associated with postpartum depression in Kenyan women
dct:creator: APHRC
dct:rights: This data is available on request
dct:description: Demographic, psychosocial and clinical factors associated with postpartum depression in Kenyan women
prov:action:
#########
# GDSC ETL is performed in two steps: shell script to ETL data into postgres
# and then additional transformations with SQL in postGIS (if needed).
####

#########
# Step 1 - bash script (pseudo code)
####

# create directory structure and move into it
mkdir -p /data/kenya_ppd_survey_2014/{download,etl} && cd /data/kenya_ppd_survey_2014

# set update flag based on last update and update frequency
do_update=0 if date() < last_update + update_frequency else do_update = 1

# remove spaces for all column headers in csv
  sed -i '1 s/ /_/g' download/kenya_ppd_survey_2014.csv

# load into postGIS with:
  ogr2ogr -lco GEOMETRY_NAME=geom -f PostgreSQL PG:"<postgres connection>" download/kenya_ppd_survey_2014.csv -nln kenya_ppd_survey_2014
dcat:contactPoint: University of Miami Libraries, Frost Institute for Data Science and Computing

fact_id: Primary key for each observation row in the fact table
individual_id: Unique identifier for an individual participant
resident_episode_id: Unique identifier for a residency episode
population_study_id: Unique identifier for each population study
instrument_item_id: Unique identifier for each item (question) in an instrument
concept_id: The concept id of the answer to a question
value_type_concept_id: The concept id of the question
value_as_char: The actual answer of a question
value_as_num: The actual answer of a question
value_as_concept: The inspire concept id of the answer to a question
individual_demographics_id: Unique ID of the an individual demographic
